title: Accents Kitchen Roll Holder and Mug Tree Set,15 x15 x35 cm Silver
features: CONTEMPRORARY: These royal cuisine Black |Red |Silver, six branch mug tree organizes and displays your favourite mugs in a stylish way whilst protecting them from chipping

CONVENIENT: The Matching Kitchen towel holder provides easy access to kitchen roll at all times, allowing you to quickly clear up sudden spills. This set makes a great gift and makes a great addition to your home.
HIGH QUALITY: These items have been manufactured with durable chrome plated Stainless steel to give a sleek finish which can easily be wiped clean with a damp cloth.
DURABLE: The anti-slip weighted base has a non-scratch oval shape base protecting your kitchen countertops and extending the products lifespan
SIZE: The mug tree and kitchen towel holder have a dimension of 15x15x35cm(Approx)
description: ✔♥This Red Royal cuisine kitchen storage accessory set includes 1 paper towel holder and 1 mug hanging rack. The kitchen towel holders have an open-ended design for easy changes of paper towel rolls. Perfect for placing on your table or countertop in your kitchen, or living room. ✔♥This kitchen storage accessory can keep maximize your countertop space whilst keeping your home neat and tidy. ✔♥The mug tree is able to hold up to 6 cups of varying sizes. The sturdy chrome plated metal branches and stoppers allow you to hang your mugs securely. ✔♥The towel pole ensures kitchen roll is always easy to reach, letting you rip off as much as you need to quickly mop up messes and spills. Both storage accessories feature anti-slip bases for added stability on surfaces and can be easily cleaned with a simple wipe to maintain the quality
